project_type: FunPay Cardinal (FPC) single-file Python plugin for automated SMM service reselling
build_system: None (single .py file plugin loaded by FPC framework)
test_framework: None (no tests exist; validation via Python syntax check)
verification_instructions: 1. Run python3 syntax check on the new file. 2. Verify no SyntaxError. 3. Check that all key functions exist and are properly structured.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - single Python file plugin
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot install packages, cannot access external APIs. Python 3.11 is pre-installed. Validation is via AST parsing and syntax checks only.
contribution_requirements: Single file must remain self-contained. All logic in one .py file as required by FPC plugin architecture.
key_patterns: Plugin uses: BIND_TO_NEW_ORDER, BIND_TO_NEW_MESSAGE, BIND_TO_PRE_INIT hooks. Storage is JSON files. Background threads for status polling, auto-pricing, auto-deactivation. PluginContext (CTX) singleton holds state. BuyerState tracks per-buyer chat state. Templates use Python str.format(). send_buyer_message(chat_id, text, buyer_username) sends FP messages. notify_tg(text) sends Telegram notifications.
directory_structure: Root contains single plugin file 'smmway_v1.3.11 (2).py' (3694 lines) and README.md. Plugin stores data in storage/plugins/smmway/ at runtime.
